_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Business architecture involves using industry standards to develop integrated views of an organisation that help implement organisational strategy and solve complex problems.
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-002 (DA, cosine: 0.479), DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.457). Shared vocabulary: [architecture]. DDaT-only terms [business, complex, develop, help, implement, industry] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, document, domain, enterprise, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.858, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Business architecture involves using industry standards to develop integrated vi" and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.457 (gap +0.061). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [architecture] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [architecture]. DDaT-only: [business, complex, develop, help, implement, industry]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, document, domain, enterprise, integration].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 98.5% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
